title: Outcome dashboard (deliveries + reuse events, reads the ledger)
context: As the project accumulates delivered briefs, datasets, and reuse events, the Steward needs a lightweight way to track progress against the success metrics (briefs in use, reuse events, delivery partners). A simple dashboard that reads the outcome ledger and displays delivery counts, reuse events, and partner status makes the metrics visible and auditable without requiring manual report-writing.
objective: Implement a lightweight outcome dashboard (CLI or static HTML) that reads the outcome ledger and displays delivery counts, reuse events, and partner status against the project success metrics.
acceptanceCriteria: Reads the outcome ledger (outcomes/*.json or equivalent) and displays: count of briefs/datasets delivered and in use, count of externally verifiable reuse events, confirmed delivery partner count, and any metrics vs. targets from PLAN.md.
Does not fabricate or estimate counts — only reads committed, verified ledger entries.
Implemented as a TypeScript/ESM CLI or static-HTML generator consistent with the project tech stack.
pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass; code is MIT-licensed; no credentials or API keys committed; commit is DCO signed-off.
output: A merged PR adding a lightweight outcome dashboard that reads the outcome ledger and displays delivery and reuse metrics.
